---
title: "Schedule"
---

Weekly plan for the current course offering. Past terms appear on the
[archive](archive.qmd) page.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
| Week | Date | Topic | Self-study | Slides | Assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2026-10-20 | Reconstruction attacks | [Reconstruction attacks](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) | [Reconstruction attacks](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb) | — | — |
| 2 | 2026-10-27 | DP as hypothesis testing | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/slides.qmd) | [Hypothesis Testing Assignment](content/assignments/hypothesis-testing-hw/assignment.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/assignments/hypothesis-testing-hw/assignment.ipynb) | — |
| 3 | 2026-11-03 | Reading week | — | — | — | No class |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
